title: Hegseth Grilled by Democrats on Iran War and $1.5T Defense Budget
summary: Pete Hegseth faced Democratic scrutiny in Senate Armed Services Committee hearing over Iran war plans and the $1.5 trillion 2027 defense budget.
contents:
# Hegseth Grilled by Democrats on Iran War and $1.5T Defense Budget

## Overview
Pete Hegseth faced Democratic scrutiny in Senate Armed Services Committee hearing over Iran war plans and the $1.5 trillion 2027 defense budget.

## Details
Testifying Thursday, Hegseth called Democratic lawmakers “reckless naysayers” and “defeatists from the cheap seats” amid bipartisan pressure on the $25 billion military budget.[1] Sen. Angus King clashed heatedly with Hegseth on the budget's structure and lack of funding for key areas.[2] The hearing remains the second day of scrutiny on Pentagon priorities.[1]

## Location
Washington, D.C., USA

## Source Context
Reporting referenced from coverage tracked by the @NationalInterest OSINT beat. The cited outlet provides additional context, attribution, and verification of the claims summarized above.

## Tags
defense budget, Hegseth, Senate hearing, Iran war, Pentagon, military spending, armed services
